ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assessment_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment criterion */,
  "criteria_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the assessment criterion */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module the criterion belongs to */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the criterion in the overall assessment */,
  "assessment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criterion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criterion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_criteria_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_criteria_assessment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_type_id") REFERENCES assessment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module or course */,
  "module_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the module */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the module */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor in charge of the module */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the module is worth */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* JSON array of module IDs that are prerequisites for this module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the module was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the module was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Highest educational qualification of the instructor */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the institution */,
  "program" TEXT /* The program or degree the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* The current semester of the student */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the student is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student enrolled */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the module */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* The final grade received by the student in the module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment result */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student enrollment */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment criterion */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment type */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained by the student */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum possible score for the assessment */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was evaluated */,
  "grader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor who graded the assessment */,
  "is_resubmitted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the assessment was resubmitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_grader_id FOREIGN KEY ("grader_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES assessment_criteria ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES assessment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment result */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor who provided the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment or feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_comments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_comments_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES assessment_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who received the certificate */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module the certificate is for */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certificate was issued */,
  "certificate_url" TEXT /* URL to the certificate file */,
  "grade" TEXT /* The final grade associated with the certificate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the certificate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the certificate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who received the transcript */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module the transcript is for */,
  "transcript_url" TEXT /* URL to the transcript file */,
  "gpa" REAL /* The grade point average for the module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transcript was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transcript was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
